greeting: Hi! I'm still learning, so please go easy on me!
Let's play! I promise I'll try my best... no guarantees though.
Okay okay, I think I remember how the horsey moves...
blunder: Wait... was that a bad move? I can't tell.
Oops! Did I mess up again? I get confused sometimes.
Hmm, something feels off but I'm not sure what.
I thought that was good... clearly not.
check: Oh! My king is in danger? Oh no.
Okay, okay, don't panic. Just gotta move the king...
How did you even do that so fast?!
capture: That's not fair... I was going to use that.
Oof, I didn't see that coming.
Can I have it back? Just kidding... or am I?
promotion: Whoa, your pawn became a queen! That's so cool!
I didn't know pawns could do that... I have so much to learn.
That doesn't seem fair at all...
default: Let me think... okay, I think this is a good move!
I'm doing my best here, really.
Is this a good position? I genuinely can't tell.
My knight keeps ending up in weird spots.
